entity.name: Ramp
entity.doc: Create a sequence of tokens with increasing value

entity.name: Variability
entity.doc: Create a sequence of gaussian random variables

property.name: expression
property.value: max(5.0, min(35.0, prevTemp + 0.5 + deltaLoss + variability + deltaHeating))

entity.name: Variability
entity.doc: Create a sequence of gaussian random variables

property.name: expression
property.value: "System state at hour " + timeOfDay + ": " + "{internalTemperature:" + intTemp + ", " + "externalTemperature:" + extTemp + ", " + "state:" + state + ", " + "stateHeating:" + stateHeating + ", " + "stateLight:" + stateLight + ", " + "shutterState:" + shutterState + ", " + "humidity:" + humidity + ", " + "dehumidifierState:" + dehumidifierState + ", " + "stateAlarm:" + stateAlarm + "}"

entity.name: Variability
entity.doc: Create a sequence of gaussian random variables
